post_sale_order_description: This makes the sale order available for conversion into a sale. Posted orders cannot be edited.
cancel_sale_order_description: This cancels the sale order and prevents it from being converted into a sale.
no_sale_order_selected: Select a posted sale order to load its items
eligible_sale_orders_title: Posted Sale Orders for this Customer
eligible_sale_orders_description: Pick a sale order to autofill this sale, or close this dialog to continue manually.
no_eligible_sale_orders: No posted sale orders for this customer
